case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS LOPEZ, JESUS R. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS TO JESUS LOPEZ RETURNED MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS.
